{ article(id:"a1"){ id title ... @defer(label:"relatedTypenameOnly") { relatedContent { __typename } } } }
{ asset(id:"v1"){ __typename id url ... @defer(label:"videoProgressOnly") { ... on VideoAsset { transcodeProgress } } } }
{ asset(id:"i1"){ __typename id url ... @defer(label:"imageDimsOnly") { ... on ImageAsset { width height } } } }
{ v: asset(id:"v1"){ __typename id url ... @defer(label:"assetVideoFields") { ... on VideoAsset { durationSeconds transcodeProgress } } } i: asset(id:"i1"){ __typename id url width: __typename } }
{ node(id:"u1"){ __typename id ... on User { username displayName organization { id name } ... @defer(label:"nodeUserReviews") { reviews { id rating body } } } } }
{ node(id:"o1"){ __typename id ... on Organization { name memberCount ... @defer(label:"nodeOrgInvoices") { invoices { id paid amountCents } } } } }
query BoundaryIds($uid:ID!,$aid:ID!){ user(id:$uid){ id displayName ... @defer(label:"boundaryUserRecs") { recommendedArticles { id title } } } article(id:$aid){ id title heroImageUrl } }
query StringBoundary($slug:String!,$locale:String!){ articleBySlug(slug:$slug,locale:$locale){ id slug locale title ... @defer(label:"stringBoundaryStats") { stats { views avgReadSeconds } } } }

query EmptyStringLookup($slug:String!,$locale:String!){ articleBySlug(slug:$slug,locale:$locale){ id title ... @defer(label:"emptySlugReviews") { reviews { id rating } } } featuredArticle { id title } }
query UnknownId($id:ID!){ user(id:$id){ id displayName ... @defer(label:"unknownUserReviews") { reviews { id rating } } } articles { id title } }
query NumericLikeIds($article:ID!,$asset:ID!){ article(id:$article){ id title ... @defer(label:"numericArticleReviews") { reviews { id rating } } } asset(id:$asset){ __typename id url } }
{ user(id:"u1"){ id displayName ... @defer(label:"emptyLikeObjects") { recommendedArticles { __typename } } } }
{ organization(id:"o1"){ id ... @defer(label:"scalarHeavyBilling") { subscription { id orgId planId status seatUtilization } invoices { id amountCents paid } } } }

{ article(id:"a2"){ id slug locale title body wordCount publishedAt author { id displayName email } ... @defer(label:"a2AllRemote") { heroImageUrl stats { views shares avgReadSeconds } reviews { id rating body readingTimeAdjusted } relatedContent { __typename id title publishedAt } } } }

{ podcast(id:"p1"){ id title publishedAt durationSeconds host { id username displayName } ... @defer(label:"podcastAllRemote") { stats { views shares avgReadSeconds } reviews { id rating body author { id displayName } } } } }

{ featuredArticle { id slug locale title author { id displayName } ... @defer(label:"featuredRemoteBundle") { heroImageUrl stats { views shares } reviews { id rating } relatedContent { __typename id title } } } }
query RepeatStableA { article(id:"a1"){ id title ... @defer(label:"repeatStable") { stats { views shares avgReadSeconds } } } }
query RepeatVars($id:ID!){ article(id:$id){ id title ... @defer(label:"repeatVars") { reviews { id rating body } } } }
query RepeatVars($id:ID!){ article(id:$id){ id title ... @defer(label:"repeatVars") { reviews { id rating body } } } }
{ article(id:"a1"){ id title ... @defer(label:"literalLabel:punctuation/space test") { reviews { id rating } } } }
{ article(id:"a1"){ id title ... @defer(label:"unicode-ish-escape-\u0031") { stats { views shares } } } }
{ articles { id title ... @defer(label:"singleDeferFlatListTypename") { __typename } } }

{ users { id displayName organization { id name memberCount } } ... @defer(label:"rootDeferAssetsAndBilling") { asset(id:"v1"){ __typename id url ... on VideoAsset { transcodeProgress } } organization(id:"o1"){ id invoices { id paid } } } }
{ ... @defer(label:"rootOnlyScalars") { article(id:"a1"){ id title } podcast(id:"p1"){ id title } user(id:"u1"){ id displayName } organization(id:"o1"){ id name } } }
